sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67661" key="miaro/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μῐᾰρότης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ητος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n67661.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">foulness, An.Ox.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0641.tlg001:2:440" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.440</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
